title: Draw a simple sketch using Pen tool and verify the mark is visible on the canvas
description: Verifies a user can draw on the canvas using the Pen tool and the stroke remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Verify element "Canvas" is visible
Click on the "Pen" tool
Click on the canvas to place a stroke point
Click on the canvas at a different location to extend the stroke
Verify element "Drawing on canvas" is visible

title: Erase part of a drawing using Eraser tool
description: Verifies the Eraser tool removes previously drawn content from the canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Click on the "Pen" tool
Click on the canvas to place a visible stroke
Click on the "Eraser" tool
Click on the previously drawn stroke area on the canvas
Verify element "Erased area on canvas" is visible

title: Create a rectangle shape and verify it appears on the canvas
description: Verifies the Rectangle tool creates a visible rectangular shape on the canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Click on the "Rectangle" tool
Click on the canvas to set the rectangle start point
Click on the canvas at a different location to set the rectangle end point
Verify element "Rectangle shape on canvas" is visible
Verify element "Shape selected" is visible

title: Add text annotation and verify the text is visible on the canvas
description: Verifies the Text tool places a text annotation onto the canvas and it is readable.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Click on the "Text" tool
Click on the canvas where the text should be placed
Type "Living Room" into the text input
Press "Enter" key
Verify text "Living Room" is visible

title: Move an existing shape using Move tool
description: Verifies the Move tool can reposition an existing shape and the new position is reflected visually.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Click on the "Rectangle" tool
Click on the canvas to set the rectangle start point
Click on the canvas at a different location to set the rectangle end point
Click on the "Move" tool
Click on the rectangle on the canvas to select it
Verify element "Selection handles" is visible

title: Undo and Redo a drawing action
description: Verifies undo removes the last action and redo restores it.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Click on the "Pen" tool
Click on the canvas to place a visible stroke
Click on the "Undo" control
Verify element "Stroke removed" is visible
Click on the "Redo" control
Verify element "Stroke present" is visible

title: Toggle grid overlay on the canvas
description: Verifies the grid overlay can be turned on and off and is visibly reflected on the canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Verify element "Canvas" is visible
Click on the "Grid" toggle
Verify element "Grid overlay" is visible
Click on the "Grid" toggle
Verify element "Grid overlay" is not visible

title: Layer visibility toggle hides and shows a layer’s content
description: Verifies turning a layer off hides its content and turning it back on shows it again.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Click on the "Pen" tool
Click on the canvas to place a visible stroke
Click on the current layer's "Visibility" toggle to hide the layer
Verify element "Layer content hidden" is visible
Click on the current layer's "Visibility" toggle to show the layer
Verify element "Layer content visible" is visible

title: Adjust layer opacity and verify the layer appears lighter/dimmer
description: Verifies changing layer opacity affects the visible intensity of content on that layer.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Click on the "Pen" tool
Click on the canvas to place a visible stroke
Click on the layer "Opacity" control
Select "50%" from the opacity dropdown
Verify element "Layer appears semi-transparent" is visible

title: Export current canvas sketch is available for AI processing entry point
description: Verifies the UI provides an action to export the canvas as an image and indicates readiness for AI processing.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page
Click on the "Pen" tool
Click on the canvas to place a visible stroke
Click on "Generate" or "Analyze" (AI processing) action
Verify element "Processing" is visible
Verify element "Sketch captured" is visible

title: Run sketch analysis successfully (primary model)
description: Verifies a user can run Step 1 sketch analysis and see a completed analysis result using the primary model.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the control to open the AI analysis (Step 1) panel.
Click on the primary model option labeled "gemini-2.5-pro".
Click on the button labeled "Analyze" (or "Run Analysis").
Verify text "Analyzing" is visible.
Verify text "Analysis complete" is visible.
Verify text "Rooms" is visible.
Verify text "Adjacency" is visible.

title: Analysis output includes expected sections (OCR, rooms, adjacency/structure)
description: Verifies the analysis results screen presents OCR text, room list, and structural/adjacency information after analysis completes.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the control to open the AI analysis (Step 1) panel.
Click on the button labeled "Analyze" (or "Run Analysis").
Verify text "Analysis complete" is visible.
Verify text "OCR" is visible.
Verify text "Rooms" is visible.
Verify text "Bounding" is visible.
Verify text "Structural" is visible.

title: User can manually choose fallback model and run analysis successfully
description: Verifies a user can select the fallback model directly and complete analysis without using the primary model.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the control to open the AI analysis (Step 1) panel.
Click on the model option labeled "gemini-2.5".
Click on the button labeled "Analyze" (or "Run Analysis").
Verify text "Analyzing" is visible.
Verify text "Analysis complete" is visible.
Verify text "Rooms" is visible.

title: Clear and re-run analysis updates the results
description: Verifies a user can clear prior analysis results and run analysis again to regenerate a fresh output.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the control to open the AI analysis (Step 1) panel.
Click on the button labeled "Analyze" (or "Run Analysis").
Verify text "Analysis complete" is visible.
Click on the button labeled "Clear analysis" (or "Reset").
Verify text "No analysis yet" is visible.
Click on the button labeled "Analyze" (or "Run Analysis").
Verify text "Analysis complete" is visible.

title: Prevent running analysis while another analysis is in progress
description: Verifies the UI blocks duplicate submissions during an ongoing analysis and indicates processing state.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the control to open the AI analysis (Step 1) panel.
Click on the button labeled "Analyze" (or "Run Analysis").
Verify text "Analyzing" is visible.
Click on the button labeled "Analyze" (or "Run Analysis") again.
Verify text "Analyzing" is visible.
Verify element "Analyze" button is visible.

title: Analysis result view supports scrolling through long output
description: Verifies the user can scroll the analysis output area and still see key sections, indicating long results are usable.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the control to open the AI analysis (Step 1) panel.
Click on the button labeled "Analyze" (or "Run Analysis").
Verify text "Analysis complete" is visible.
Scroll to the bottom of the analysis results area.
Verify text "Structural" is visible.
Scroll to the top of the analysis results area.
Verify text "OCR" is visible.

title: Generate CAD-style plan image successfully (primary model)
description: Verifies a user can generate a CAD-style floor plan image and see the result rendered in the UI using the primary image model path.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's main page.
Verify element "Canvas" is visible.
Click on "Generate" (or "Generate Plan Image") to start image generation.
Verify text "Generating" is visible.
Verify element "Generated plan image" is visible.
Verify text "Style" is visible.

title: Prevent generation when required analysis input is missing
description: Verifies the UI blocks Step 2 image generation if the structural analysis input is not available and provides guidance to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's main page.
Verify element "Canvas" is visible.
Click on "Generate Plan Image" (Step 2) without having completed the analysis step.
Verify text "Run analysis first" is visible.
Verify element "Generated plan image" is not visible.

title: Prevent generation when canvas/sketch input is missing
description: Verifies the UI blocks Step 2 image generation when there is no sketch/canvas content and shows an informative message.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's main page.
Click on "Clear canvas" (or "Reset") to ensure the canvas is empty.
Verify text "Canvas cleared" is visible.
Click on "Generate" (or "Generate Plan Image").
Verify text "Add a sketch" is visible.
Verify element "Generated plan image" is not visible.

title: User can cancel image generation in progress
description: Verifies a user can cancel an in-progress image generation job and the UI returns to an idle state without showing a new image.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's main page.
Verify element "Canvas" is visible.
Click on "Generate" (or "Generate Plan Image") to start image generation.
Verify text "Generating" is visible.
Click on "Cancel".
Verify text "Generating" is not visible.

title: Generated image can be regenerated and updates the displayed result
description: Verifies that running generation again replaces the prior generated plan image with a newly generated one (no stale state).

steps.description: Navigate to the application's main page.
Click on "Generate" (or "Generate Plan Image").
Verify element "Generated plan image" is visible.
Click on "Regenerate" (or "Generate again").
Verify text "Generating" is visible.
Verify element "Generated plan image" is visible.

title: Style metadata is displayed alongside the generated plan image
description: Verifies the UI surfaces returned style metadata (e.g., template/style name) when an image generation succeeds.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's main page.
Click on "Generate" (or "Generate Plan Image").
Verify element "Generated plan image" is visible.
Verify text "Style" is visible.
Verify element "Style metadata" is visible.

title: BYOK: add a personal Gemini API key and verify it is saved in the UI
description: Verifies a user can enter a personal Gemini API key via the UI and the app reflects that the key is configured.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the UI control that opens the API key configuration (for example, 'API Key', 'Settings', or 'Configure key').
Verify text "API key" is visible.
Type "AIzaSyDUMMY_PERSONAL_KEY_1234567890" into the personal API key input field.
Click on the button to save or apply the API key.
Verify text indicating the API key is configured (for example, "Key saved", "Personal key enabled", or "Using personal key") is visible.

title: BYOK: remove personal API key and verify it is cleared in the UI
description: Verifies a user can remove a previously saved personal API key and the app reflects that no personal key is configured.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the UI control that opens the API key configuration (for example, 'API Key', 'Settings', or 'Configure key').
Verify text "API key" is visible.
Click on the button to remove, clear, or disable the personal API key.
Click on the confirmation button (if a confirmation dialog or inline confirmation is shown).
Verify text indicating no API key is configured (for example, "No personal key", "Key not set", or "Add your API key") is visible.

title: Validation: prevent saving an empty personal API key
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving when the personal API key input is empty and shows a validation message.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the UI control that opens the API key configuration (for example, 'API Key', 'Settings', or 'Configure key').
Verify text "API key" is visible.
Type "" into the personal API key input field.
Click on the button to save or apply the API key.
Verify text indicating the key is required (for example, "API key is required" or "Please enter an API key") is visible.

title: Validation: reject an obviously invalid API key format
description: Verifies the UI handles a clearly invalid key entry and displays an error without enabling successful configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page.
Click on the UI control that opens the API key configuration (for example, 'API Key', 'Settings', or 'Configure key').
Verify text "API key" is visible.
Type "not-a-real-key" into the personal API key input field.
Click on the button to save or apply the API key.
Verify text indicating the key is invalid (for example, "Invalid API key" or "Key format not recognized") is visible.

title: Health check shows server key available and UI indicates proxy mode is available
description: Verifies the app can load and visibly indicates that a server-side Gemini key is available (proxy mode available).

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Verify text "Server key" is visible.
Verify text "available" is visible.
Verify text "Proxy" is visible.
Verify text "mode" is visible.

title: Health check shows no server key and UI prompts user to provide their own key (BYOK)
description: Verifies the app visibly prompts for a user-provided key when the server key is not configured (fallback flow).

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Verify text "API key" is visible.
Verify text "Add" is visible.
Verify text "your own key" is visible.
Verify text "BYOK" is visible.

title: App remains usable when health check status indicator is present (server key available case)
description: Verifies that when a healthy status is shown, the primary call-to-action for creating a plan is still visible.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Verify text "Healthy" is visible.
Verify element "Start" is visible.
Verify element "Canvas" is visible.

title: App remains usable when BYOK prompt is present (no server key case)
description: Verifies that even when prompting for a key, the UI still shows a clear next step to continue or configure the key.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Verify text "No server key" is visible.
Verify element "Enter API key" is visible.
Verify element "Continue" is visible.

title: Health check failure shows a visible, user-friendly service status message
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible service-unavailable or retry message when it cannot determine health/key state.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Verify text "Unable to check service status" is visible.
Verify element "Retry" is visible.
Verify text "Try again" is visible.

title: Retry after health check failure updates the visible status (recovery)
description: Verifies that using a visible Retry control updates the health/key detection state shown on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to the application home page.
Verify element "Retry" is visible.
Click on "Retry".
Verify text "Healthy" is visible.
Verify text "API key" is visible.

title: View Library list with saved floor plans and timestamps
description: Verifies the in-app library displays saved generated floor plans with visible timestamps.

steps.description: Navigate to the Library page using the app’s main navigation (Library).
Verify page title contains "Library".
Verify element "Saved floor plans list" is visible.
Verify element "At least one library item card" is visible.
Verify element "Timestamp on a library item" is visible.
Scroll to the bottom of the library list.
Verify element "At least one library item card" is visible.

title: Open a library item and see generated image plus analysis metadata
description: Verifies a saved library item can be opened and shows the generated image along with analysis metadata (rooms/structure).

steps.description: Navigate to the Library page using the app’s main navigation (Library).
Click on the first library item card.
Verify element "Generated floor plan image preview" is visible.
Verify text "Analysis" is visible.
Verify text "Rooms" is visible.
Verify text "Structure" is visible.
Verify element "Timestamp" is visible.

title: Verify newest saved result appears first (timestamp order)
description: Verifies the library displays items in reverse-chronological order based on timestamps.

steps.description: Navigate to the Library page using the app’s main navigation (Library).
Verify element "First library item timestamp" is visible.
Click on the first library item card.
Verify element "Timestamp" is visible.
Click on "Back to Library" (or the Library breadcrumb) to return to the library list.
Click on the second library item card.
Verify element "Timestamp" is visible.

title: Result display shows export options for a library item
description: Verifies export options are visible for a selected library item in the result display.

steps.description: Navigate to the Library page using the app’s main navigation (Library).
Click on the first library item card.
Verify text "Export" is visible.
Verify element "Export options section" is visible.
Verify element "Generated floor plan image preview" is visible.
Verify text "Analysis" is visible.
